Commands  ›   ›  Connector Ops Split Curve At Station Along Axis

Connector Ops Split Curve At Station Along Axis

writes to model Public API · not yet exposed

ConnectorOpsSplitCurveAtStationAlongAxisCommand — split a pipe at a station (distance from end 0).

Before you run this

Pipe resolvable; distance within pipe length.

After it runs

Two pipes + union fitting inside one Transaction.

When to use this

  • Pre-step for fitting insertion.
Don't use this when

Arbitrary orientation — uses LocationCurve.

Decision flow

1) Resolver_ElementUniqueId required OR single Pipe selection.
2) Resolver_DistanceFromEnd0Mm required and within bounds.
3) Delegate to SplitCurveAtStation.SplitAtDistanceFromEnd0 (opens its own Transaction via SplitAtStation).
4) Emit left_id + right_id.

What you'll see in the chat

on start
Splitting curve at station…
thinking
Resolving pipe + distance…
Delegating to SplitCurveAtStation…
on success
Split: left {left_id}, right {right_id}.
on failure
Split failed: {error}

REST API

Not yet exposed

This command does not carry a [RestApi] attribute today. Once tagged, this section will auto-populate with:

  • POST /api/v1/commands/connector_ops_split_curve_at_station_along_axis
  • Request body schema (from [RestApiParam])
  • Response schema (from [RestApiResponse])
  • curl / JS / Python code examples

Keywords & intent patterns

connectoropssplitcurveatstationalongaxis · split pipe at distance · split curve at station
